Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.xprover.tests

Class XProverReasonerTests.ProofMonitor

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.xprover.tests.XProverReasonerTests.ProofMonitor
All Implemented Interfaces:
IProofMonitor
Enclosing class:
XProverReasonerTests
static class XProverReasonerTests.ProofMonitor extends Object implements IProofMonitor
Simple proof monitor.

  • Method Details

    • isCanceled

      public boolean isCanceled()
      Description copied from interface: IProofMonitor
      Returns whether cancellation of the current operation has been requested. Long-running operations should poll to see if cancellation has been requested.
      Specified by:
      isCanceled in interface IProofMonitor
      Returns:
      true iff cancellation has been requested
      See Also:
      • IProofMonitor.setCanceled(boolean)

    • setCanceled

      public void setCanceled(boolean value)
      Description copied from interface: IProofMonitor
      Sets the cancel state to the given value.
      Specified by:
      setCanceled in interface IProofMonitor
      Parameters:
      value - true indicates that cancellation has been requested (but not necessarily acknowledged); false clears this flag
      See Also:
      • IProofMonitor.isCanceled()

    • setTask

      public void setTask(String name)
      Description copied from interface: IProofMonitor
      Notifies that a task is beginning.
      Specified by:
      setTask in interface IProofMonitor
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the task
